title: WorkflowV1
description: The rebar workflow DSL, schema_version "1". A coordinate-free, GitHub-Actions-style `steps:` document, git-tracked under .rebar/workflows/<name>.yaml and edited by agents+humans with clean diffs. This schema is IMMUTABLE and version-pinned at a stable $id (WS-B3): once shipped it is never edited in place; a new DSL version ships as workflow.v2.schema.json with a read-time vN->v(N+1) up-conversion shim. `additionalProperties:false` everywhere so an unknown key is a located error rather than a silent no-op (the Argo lesson). Steps are EITHER scripted (`uses:` a registry step) OR agentic (`prompt:` an .rebar/prompts/<id>.md) — never both (oneOf). Reference integrity, the expression allow-list, and the secret scan are enforced by the linter (rebar.llm.workflow.lint), not by this structural schema.

schema_version.description: DSL version, typed as a STRING (never a YAML float). For this schema it is exactly "1"; a value the running rebar does not recognize is a hard upgrade-rebar error (WS-B3).

name.description: Stable human workflow id (lowercase, no spaces); the file stem under .rebar/workflows/.

model.description: Workflow-level default model for agent steps, e.g. `anthropic:claude-opus-4-8`. Per-step `model` overrides this (precedence step > workflow > config > env > default).

inputs.description: Declared workflow inputs, referenced as `${{ inputs.<name> }}`.

steps.description: The ordered step list. Execution order is the topological order of `needs` edges (graphlib.static_order), NOT array position; array order is for human readability only.

step.description: A single workflow step. Exactly one of `uses` (scripted) or `prompt` (agentic) is required (oneOf). Agent-only fields (output_schema, mode, model) on a scripted step, or a scripted-only shape on an agent step, are flagged by the linter.

id.description: Stable, unique step id; the anchor for `${{ steps.<id>.outputs.* }}` references.

type.description: Optional explicit discriminator; if present it must agree with uses/prompt (linter-checked). Normally inferred.

uses.description: Scripted step: the registry name of a deterministic built-in (rebar.llm.workflow.steps).

prompt.description: Agentic step: the prompt id resolving to .rebar/prompts/<id>.md (git-canonical; WS-F).

needs.description: Upstream step ids this step depends on; defines the execution DAG.

with.description: Inputs to the step: a map of name -> literal or `${{ ... }}` expression (allow-listed; the linter forbids raw ${{}} leaking into prompt/command bodies).

output_schema.description: Agent step: the JSON Schema name constraining the step's structured output (default review_result).

mode.description: Agent step output-finalization strategy (WS-D1). `findings` = review_result pipeline; `structured` = validate against output_schema; `text` = raw text.

model.description: Agent step: per-step model override, e.g. `anthropic:claude-opus-4-8` or `openai:gpt-4o` (highest precedence).

if.description: Optional guard expression from the closed allow-list (linter-enforced); the step runs only when it evaluates truthy.
